import io
import string

fn find_eq(_ s: String) -> Int
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  mut found = -1
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 61 and found == -1
        found = i
      end
    when None
      found = found
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  found
end

fn main() -> Unit
  mut done = false
  while not done
    match io.read_line()
    when Some(line)
      let idx = find_eq(line)
      if idx >= 0
        let key = string.substring(line, 0, idx)
        let value = string.substring(line, idx + 1, string.len(line))
        println("#{key}:#{value}")
      end
    when None
      done = true
    end
  end
end
